sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35373" key="e)nemati/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνεμᾰτίζω</orth>, <sense id="n35373.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">treat with a clyster,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τινά</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hierocl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Facet.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">176</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
